blockers.resolution: Restore or regenerate the frozen Stanford Alpaca clean/poisoned first-slice labeled-pairs JSONL without modifying benchmark truth.
Restore or rerun the first-slice target-response generation planning package so row-level request contracts are available.
Provide a real local Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct model path or explicitly provision an approved external resource.

blockers.observed_error: NVIDIA-SMI has failed because it couldn't communicate with the NVIDIA driver.
blockers.resolution: Restore NVIDIA driver/runtime visibility and rerun GPU readiness checks before any 7B inference task.

non_blocker_notes: Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct must not be used as a substitute for Qwen2.5-7B main-model evidence.
This task intentionally does not create response, logprob, or metric artifacts.
